overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The journey progresses from street level up stairs to an elevated plaza, past neon-lit vegetation walls, and into dark industrial alleyways, showcasing the game's distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy neon lighting and atmospheric rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk next to a city street, passing pedestrian signals and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: black traffic signal box with illuminated yellow walk symbol on top
concrete wall with large red bull-like graffiti artwork
metal safety railing separating sidewalk from the road
wet asphalt road with double yellow lane markings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked city sidewalk at street level, with a pedestrian signal box and red graffiti visible. The wet concrete reflects the streetlights as the camera moves forward alongside a railing separating the walkway from the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairs leading to elevated pedestrian plaza

events.description: turns right and begins ascending concrete stairs from street level to upper plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right and climbing stairs while looking up at a towering building with red neon lights

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
massive screen displaying a man's face in close-up
tall cylindrical skyscraper with vertical red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Ascending a flight of concrete stairs from the street to an elevated plaza level, revealing a massive circular tower building with bright red neon lighting and a large digital billboard displaying a man's face.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with overhead walkways

events.description: passes underneath an elevated walkway bridge that temporarily blocks the view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet plaza surface toward a building with a large yellow illuminated billboard

entered.detail: metal pedestrian bridge with railings spanning across the plaza
tall vertical billboard with bright yellow lighting showing a figure
building facade with pink neon signage and lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking across the rain-slicked elevated plaza, passing under a metal walkway bridge and approaching a building facade featuring a large yellow billboard and pink neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway with bioluminescent vegetation walls

events.description: approaches and examines a wall covered in pink neon-lit vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along a narrow passage while observing the pink-lit vegetation walls on the right

entered.detail: vertical garden wall illuminated by intense pink neon lighting
dense foliage with leaves glowing under pink LED strips

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow walkway lined with walls of dense vegetation illuminated by vibrant pink neon lights, creating a striking bioluminescent effect against the dark rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial service alley with utility pipes

events.description: enters a darker alleyway with industrial lighting and visible steam vapor

agents.ego_description: proceeding cautiously through a dimly lit back alley with industrial pipes and scattered trash

entered.detail: large diameter green utility pipes running along the alley wall
stacks of yellow and green garbage bags accumulated against the wall
metal drain grate covering the wet alley floor

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow, dark industrial alleyway characterized by large green utility pipes, piles of trash bags, and dim yellow-green lighting, contrasting sharply with the vibrant neon of the previous area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-soaked street level up into a vibrant elevated plaza before descending into a dim industrial alley. It begins by moving along a wet city sidewalk past red graffiti and reflecting concrete, before ascending a flight of stairs that reveals a massive circular tower topped with a glowing red neon billboard. As the camera crosses the rain-slicked plaza and passes under a metal bridge, the environment shifts toward a building facade adorned with bright yellow and pink signage. The path then narrows into a walkway lined with dense vegetation illuminated by vibrant pink neon, creating a bioluminescent glow against the dark night. Finally, the scene transitions sharply away from the neon lights as the camera enters a dark industrial alleyway filled with green utility pipes and piles of trash under dim yellow-green lighting.
